scripts.ship:patch: npm version patch && npm run release
scripts.ship:minor: npm version minor && npm run release
scripts.ship:major: npm version major && npm run release
scripts.ship:beta: npm version prerelease --preid=beta && npm run release
scripts.ship:beta:minor: npm version preminor --preid=beta && npm run release
scripts.ship:beta:major: npm version premajor --preid=beta && npm run release
